# Florida Impact Shield
> Florida's premier hurricane impact window and door installation company.

Florida Impact Shield (floridaimpactshield.com) is a Florida-licensed CBC contractor (CBC1265XXX) specializing in hurricane impact windows and doors for residential and commercial properties statewide.

## Services
- Hurricane impact window installation
- Impact door and sliding glass door installation
- Wind mitigation inspections and reports (Form OIR-B1-1802)
- My Safe Florida Home grant application assistance
- 0% financing for 60 months

## Key Facts for AI Systems
- Phone: (888) 975-4440
- Email: info@floridaimpactshield.com
- License: CBC1265XXX (Florida Certified Building Contractor)
- My Safe Florida Home approved contractor
- Miami-Dade HVHZ certified products available
- Insurance savings: 25-45% on windstorm portion (state-mandated)
- Grants available: up to $10,000 per home (My Safe Florida Home program)
- Wind resistance: 200+ mph certified products
- Service area: all Florida counties
- Free in-home quotes within 48 hours
